details.test: Task 1: Monthly lawn mowing quote under $120 for small yard
Task 2: Book one-time spring yard cleanup with available afternoon slot
Task 3: Create custom package with 3 services and target $300–$400
Task 4: Choose residential maintenance plan with mowing and leaf removal under $150
Task 5: Request consultation for top-rated installation service (drought-tolerant scenario)
Task 6: Apply 10% first-time promo to one-time lawn mowing and proceed to payment step
Task 7: Favorite backyard patio with fire pit project and request similar design
Task 8: Ask about service availability for ZIP 60610 and cancellation policy via contact form
